serviceAreas.description: We serve the entire San Francisco Bay Area from local yards in Oakland and San Jose.

heavyMaterial.bestFor: Small concrete removal, dirt, driveway work
Foundation demo, brick and block, garage cleanouts

generalDebris.bestFor: Full room renovations, roofing, large cleanouts
Major renovations, new construction, estate cleanouts
High volume debris and commercial use

general.label: General Debris
general.overagePolicy: $165 per ton beyond included tonnage, based on certified scale ticket. Heavy materials use flat-fee pricing with no weight overage.

heavy.label: Heavy / Inert Materials
heavy.overagePolicy: Flat fee pricing. Disposal is included. No extra weight charges.
rules: Must be clean / uncontaminated loads only
If trash or mixed debris is found, load is reclassified to General Debris at $165/ton overage
Fill-line enforcement: do not exceed the marked fill line for safety

rentalPolicy.overfillPolicy: Materials must not extend above the top of the dumpster walls. Overfilled dumpsters cannot be legally transported and may incur additional fees.

deliveryInfo.sameDayCutoff: Orders placed before 12:00 PM local time
deliveryInfo.note: Delivery times are estimated windows, not guaranteed exact times.

permitGuidance.general: If the dumpster is placed on your private property (driveway, yard), no permit is typically needed. If it must go on the street or public right-of-way, you will likely need a permit from your city.
permitGuidance.recommendation: We recommend placing the dumpster on your driveway whenever possible to avoid permit requirements.
permitGuidance.disclaimer: Permit rules vary by city. Contact your local public works department for specific requirements. We can point you in the right direction.

pricingDisclaimer: Exact pricing depends on your ZIP code, dumpster size, material type, and distance from our yard. Use our instant calculator for an accurate quote.
